creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Antonio Gandara from comment #2)
> Is there a reason it took ten months to hear back on a status of
> this submission as that seems awfully long to hear back on a port
> submission.

I agree with you it is an awfully long time, Antonio.  I have been on
the receiving side of this as well before getting a ports commit bit.

You have to understand that we're a small team of volunteers who do
ports work in our free time.  We currently have approx. 2500 open
ports bugs.  That new ports sometimes take a long time to be noticed
is an unfortunate reality of that.

> what is it that you want me to do

In light of the above I'd like you to lend me a hand and fix the
problems I raised, so that I can commit it without much extra work on
my part.

Or if you're no longer interested or have moved on from FreeBSD then
let's close this bug :-)
